title: astragalus poluninii
intro: Astragalus poluninii, also known as Polunin's milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus poluninii include its potential to reduce stress and fatigue, improve respiratory function, and enhance overall well-being. Astragalus poluninii can be prepared as an herbal supplement, tea, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to promote health and vitality.
